variants: Sushmita Mukherji is a distinguished scholar in the field of Comparative literature. Sushmita is also an active member of the Verdant Drift Crafters, a society dedicated to promoting collaborative literature and the arts. Her doctoral advisor, Vikram Devalla, played a crucial role in her academic development.
